case_title: ASHDOWN ARCHITECTURE, INC. VS. ROBIN WEBSTER

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHDOWN ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBSTER, ROBIN

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEBSTER, ROBIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,325.00 FILED BY ASHDOWN ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WEBSTER, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ASHDOWN ARCHITECTURE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
